name: openviking-plugins
description: Company OpenViking plugins for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode.

scripts.check:codex: node --check codex/scripts/session-state.mjs && node --check codex/scripts/config.mjs && node --check codex/scripts/auto-capture.mjs && node --check codex/scripts/auto-recall.mjs && node --check codex/scripts/pre-compact-capture.mjs && node --check codex/scripts/session-start-commit.mjs
scripts.check:claude: node --check claude/scripts/lib/ov-session.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/config.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/auto-capture.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/auto-recall.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/pre-compact.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/session-start.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/session-end.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/subagent-start.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/subagent-stop.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/ov-status.mjs && node --check claude/scripts/statusline.mjs
scripts.check:all: npm run typecheck && npm run check:codex && npm run check:claude
